name: OmopAllergyIntoleranceObservationView
title: AllergyIntolerance → observation (flat)
description: FHIR AllergyIntolerance records patient allergies and intolerances. OMOP has no dedicated allergy table, so allergies are stored in the observation table with allergy-specific SNOMED concepts. One AllergyIntolerance maps to one observation row. Status filtering excludes inactive/resolved allergies and entered-in-error/refuted records.

column.name: observation_id
column.description: Surrogate key from AllergyIntolerance.id. Hash or sequence via ctx.ids.getId().

column.name: observation_concept_id
column.description: SNOMED allergy/substance concept. Requires vocabulary lookup. This project: 0 (placeholder). omoponfhir: category-driven (food->4188027, medication->439224, default->40772948). FhirToCdm: direct vocab lookup on code.

column.name: observation_date
column.description: If all absent, the record is skipped. — transform: dateTime -> date; fallback chain: onsetDateTime -> onsetPeriod.start -> recordedDate

column.name: observation_datetime
column.description: Full ISO datetime when available. Null if source is date-only or from fallback.

column.name: value_as_string
column.description: All reactions and manifestations are included. — transform: Concatenate all reaction manifestation display names, semicolon-separated.

column.name: value_as_concept_id
column.description: First reaction manifestation concept. Requires vocab lookup. This project: null (placeholder). HL7 IG FML maps manifestation code here. omoponfhir places the substance here instead.

column.name: provider_id
column.description: omoponfhir uses recorder only. — transform: Prefer asserter, fall back to recorder. Only Practitioner/PractitionerRole references are valid for provider_id.

column.name: visit_occurrence_id
column.description: Resolve Encounter reference. Null if absent.

column.name: observation_source_value
column.description: Source allergy code (verbatim). Best coding selected by system priority (SNOMED > RxNorm > first).

where.description: clinicalStatus is active or absent; verificationStatus is not entered-in-error or refuted
